## What changed?

Describe the user-facing problem and the solution.

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `npm run test:server`
- [ ] `npm run build:server`
- [ ] `npm run build:web`

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and backwards compatibility was considered.
- [ ] Behavior changes include regression coverage.
- [ ] No credentials, exported connection bundles, or production data are included.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when necessary.
